title: Wang Xingxing from HuaZhu says at the World Internet Conference: The 'ChatGPT Moment' for Humanoid Robots Is Coming in as Few as Two or Three Years
excerpt: Humanoid robots went from wobbling steps to boxing and dancing in just a few years; however, the critical point of being able to work effectively, rather than j
content_html:
Humanoid robots went from wobbling steps to boxing and dancing in just a few years; however, the critical point of being able to work effectively, rather than just moving, may be closer than most people expect. On July 22, at the 2026 World Internet Conference Digital Silk Road Development Forum held in Xi'an, Shaanxi, Wang Xingxing, founder and CEO of UBTech, took the opening speech platform and presented an extremely aggressive timeline: the "ChatGPT moment" of embodied intelligence may arrive within just two or three years.

The moment he referred to has both high and specific thresholds—by then, robots will be able to start working directly in most unfamiliar environments, running many basic functions smoothly, without relying on pre-programmed action libraries or human remote control. In recent years, the progress of such robots in walking, dancing, martial arts fighting, and even simple services has been evident. Wang Xingxing believes that this acceleration will push them over the threshold from demonstration to practical application.

On July 22, at the 2026 World Internet Conference Digital Silk Road Development Forum held in Xi'an, Shaanxi, Wang Xingxing, founder and CEO of UBTech, took the opening speech platform and presented an extremely aggressive timeline: the "ChatGPT moment" of embodied intelligence may arrive within just two or three years.The moment he referred to has both high and specific thresholds—by then, robots will be able to start working directly in most unfamiliar environments, running many basic functions smoothly, without relying on pre-programmed action libraries or human remote control. In recent years, the progress of such robots in walking, dancing, martial arts fighting, and even simple services has been evident. Wang Xingxing believes that this acceleration will push them over the threshold from demonstration to practical application.

blocks.html_en: Humanoid robots went from wobbling steps to boxing and dancing in just a few years; however, the critical point of being able to work effectively, rather than just moving, may be closer than most people expect. On July 22, at the 2026 World Internet Conference Digital Silk Road Development Forum held in Xi'an, Shaanxi, Wang Xingxing, founder and CEO of UBTech, took the opening speech platform and presented an extremely aggressive timeline: the "ChatGPT moment" of embodied intelligence may arrive within just two or three years.

sentences.en: Humanoid robots went from wobbling steps to boxing and dancing in just a few years; however, the critical point of being able to work effectively, rather than just moving, may be closer than most people expect.
sentences.zh: 人形机器人在短短几年内就从摇摇晃晃的脚步变成了拳击和跳舞；然而，能够有效工作的临界点，而不仅仅是移动，可能比大多数人预期的更接近。

sentences.en: On July 22, at the 2026 World Internet Conference Digital Silk Road Development Forum held in Xi'an, Shaanxi, Wang Xingxing, founder and CEO of UBTech, took the opening speech platform and presented an extremely aggressive timeline: the "ChatGPT moment" of embodied intelligence may arrive within just two or three years.
sentences.zh: 7月22日，在陕西西安举行的2026世界互联网大会数字丝绸之路发展论坛上，优必选创始人兼CEO王星星在开场演讲台上提出了一个极其激进的时间表：物联网智能的“ChatGPT时刻”可能在短短两三年内到来。

blocks.html_en: The moment he referred to has both high and specific thresholds—by then, robots will be able to start working directly in most unfamiliar environments, running many basic functions smoothly, without relying on pre-programmed action libraries or human remote control. In recent years, the progress of such robots in walking, dancing, martial arts fighting, and even simple services has been evident. Wang Xingxing believes that this acceleration will push them over the threshold from demonstration to practical application.

sentences.en: The moment he referred to has both high and specific thresholds—by then, robots will be able to start working directly in most unfamiliar environments, running many basic functions smoothly, without relying on pre-programmed action libraries or human remote control.
sentences.zh: 他所说的那一刻既有很高的门槛，也有特定的门槛，届时，机器人将能够在最陌生的环境中直接开始工作，顺利运行许多基本功能，而无需依赖预先编程的动作库或人类远程控制。

sentences.en: In recent years, the progress of such robots in walking, dancing, martial arts fighting, and even simple services has been evident.
sentences.zh: 近年来，此类机器人在行走、跳舞、武术格斗，甚至简单的服务方面的进步都十分明显。

sentences.en: Wang Xingxing believes that this acceleration will push them over the threshold from demonstration to practical application.
sentences.zh: 王星星认为，这种加速将推动他们跨过从示范到实际应用的门槛。

content_html_zh:
人形机器人在短短几年内就从摇摇晃晃的脚步变成了拳击和跳舞；然而，能够有效工作的临界点，而不仅仅是移动，可能比大多数人预期的更接近。 7月22日，在陕西西安举行的2026世界互联网大会数字丝绸之路发展论坛上，优必选创始人兼CEO王星星在开场演讲台上提出了一个极其激进的时间表：物联网智能的“ChatGPT时刻”可能在短短两三年内到来。

他所说的那一刻既有很高的门槛，也有特定的门槛，届时，机器人将能够在最陌生的环境中直接开始工作，顺利运行许多基本功能，而无需依赖预先编程的动作库或人类远程控制。 近年来，此类机器人在行走、跳舞、武术格斗，甚至简单的服务方面的进步都十分明显。 王星星认为，这种加速将推动他们跨过从示范到实际应用的门槛。
